A '''Big Napper''' is one who prospered under all three phases of [[The Big Nap]] and remained intellectually coherent, at least within the class of Big Nappers.

<blockquote>
"To be a true Big Napper you needed to have a full life’s sleep."

- [[Eric Weinstein]], [[ep30|Episode 30]] of [[The Portal Podcast]]
</blockquote>

{{Stub}}

[[Category:Twin Nuclei Problem]]
[[sn:Big Napper]][[Category:History]]
[[sn:Big Napper]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
